data.description: SAGA Metals closes fully subscribed private placement and gives a corporate update.

data.title: Increase in W.N.B.A. spotlight leads to online discrimination and false info, perpetuating sexism and racism.
data.description: The increasing popularity of the league has led to a surge in online sexism and racism, as well as the spread of misinformation encompassing both issues.

data.title: Rokid Glasses on Kickstarter amassed $3.6M from 5,000 backers in 45 days, setting a record.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Rokid, a company specializing in human-computer interaction and augmented reality, revealed the successful conclusion of its Kickstarter drive for Rokid Glasses. The campaign amassed an impressive $3,613,470 from more than 5,000 supporters within a span of 45 days. This triumph solidifies Rokid's position as a leader in innovative technology and showcases the strong interest in their latest product.

data.title: Bitcoin could rise by 21% in a week after plunging over 5% in October, a noted economist predicts based on past trends.
data.description: According to an economist, experiencing a decline of over 5% in October is highly unusual for Bitcoin. Historically, the cryptocurrency has tended to bounce back within a week after such drops.

data.title: Christian Bishop announced his candidacy for Nevada Assembly District 29, stating his love for Henderson and its people.
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada on October 10, 2025, Christian Bishop revealed his intention to run for the Nevada Assembly District 29. In his announcement, he expressed excitement about his candidacy, highlighting his deep connection to Henderson as his hometown and his admiration for the local community.

data.title: BWI Group reaches milestone with 11 millionth MagneRide damper produced in Krosno, Poland, expects growth in demand.
data.description: In Krakow, Poland, BWI Group celebrates the production of its 11 millionth MagneRide damper at the Krosno facility. The achievement was highlighted during a virtual technology forum attended by engineers, academics, and vehicle manufacturer representatives. The event focused on discussing the system's performance and potential applications. With the automotive industry shifting towards increased digitization and advanced software-defined vehicle architectures, BWI Group anticipates a notable rise in demand for their products.

data.title: Investors of Lantheus are reminded to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses between Feb 26-Aug 5, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who incurred losses in Lantheus to reach out to him for a consultation regarding potential actions. If you bought or gained securities in Lantheus within the period from February 26, 2025, to August 5, 2025, and wish to explore further options, contact James Wilson directly.
TRUMP: APPROXIMATELY 28 BODIES

data.title: Legacy 237-acre Thompson Ranch in Dripping Springs, TX, available for development, luxury estate, recreation, or conservation.
data.description: A sprawling 237-acre Thompson Ranch in Dripping Springs, Texas is now available for sale. The property offers prime opportunities for development, luxury estate construction, recreation, or conservation purposes.

data.title: Stock market drops after Trump adds 100% China tariff. Companies like Oracle, JPMorgan, Taiwan Semi in focus. Tesla's performance in question.
data.description: Following President Trump's announcement of significant tariffs on China, the stock market experienced a sharp decline. Companies such as Oracle, JPMorgan, and Taiwan Semiconductor are set to release their financial reports. Investors are also questioning the stability of Tesla's stock chart. Trump's decision to impose a 100% tariff on Chinese goods has impacted market performance, but specific details remain undisclosed. The situation is closely monitored by experts and investors.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Nutex Health investors, losses between Aug 8, 2024 and Aug 15, 2025. Contact for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Nutex to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Nutex during the period from August 8, 2024, to August 15, 2025, and are interested in deliberating on your options, Wilson is available for consultation.

data.title: Revival Gold Inc (TSXV: RVG, OTCQX: RVLGF) updates on AGM at 110 Yonge St, Toronto on Nov 20, 2025 at 10:00 A.M. Can vote shares online due to Canada Post strike.
data.description: Revival Gold Inc. (TSXV: RVG, OTCQX: RVLGF) is updating shareholders on the details of its upcoming annual general and special meeting scheduled for November 20, 2025 at 10:00 A.M. (Toronto time) at Peterson McVicar LLP in Toronto. Due to the Canada Post mail strike, the Company is offering alternative methods for shareholders to vote their shares for the Meeting. The meeting materials are available for shareholders at the specified office location.

data.title: Deal sealed: Trump negotiates with AstraZeneca to reduce drug costs after tariff threats. Other firms in talks with White House.
data.description: The president, alongside key health officials, have confirmed the utilization of tariff threats as a bargaining tool in reaching an agreement. Numerous companies are currently engaged in talks with the White House, with figures indicating ongoing negotiations with other firms.

data.title: Trump leverages tariff threats to secure deal with AstraZeneca on drug prices. Other firms in talks.
data.description: The president, along with key health officials, have admitted to utilizing tariff threats as a means to reach a deal. While some companies have agreed to terms, numerous others are currently engaged in discussions with the White House.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of MoonLake Immunotherapeutics investors who suffered losses. Contact them if affected.
data.description: James Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in MoonLake to reach out to him directly. If you have incurred significant losses in MoonLake stock or options and are seeking to explore your legal options, contact him promptly for assistance.

data.title: IronGate Capital Advisors grows investment portfolio to over 540 defense tech companies, leading fund platform.
data.description: IronGate Capital Advisors, a prominent defense tech venture capital firm in the US, recently disclosed that its investment portfolio now comprises over 540 companies spread across its two funds. These companies vary from early-stage start-ups to more established growth equity firms. Established in 2018, IronGate Capital Advisors has aimed to foster collaboration within the defense tech industry by engaging in co-investment opportunities with key players in the sector.
Dave McCormick, a member of Congress, has recently revealed fresh stock transactions.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Jasper between Nov 30, 2023 and July 3, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Jasper to reach out to him for a discussion of their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Jasper from November 30, 2023, to July 3, 2025, and wish to explore potential remedies, contact James directly.

data.title: Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 30, after market opens in Santiago.
data.description: Today, BANCO ITAÚ CHILE (SSE: ITAUCL) revealed that their financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025, will be made public on October 30, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released before the market hours in Santiago.

data.title: PharmaCorp corrects Q2 2025 financial statements; no impact on financial position. Audit led to restated filings.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, PharmaCorp Rx Inc. announced the restatement and refiling of its financial statements for the interim period ending on June 30, 2025. The company, trading under the symbol TSXV: PCRX, made certain accounting adjustments as a result of a review by its Auditor. The amended Q2 2025 statements and management's discussion and analysis can be found on PharmaCorp’s profile on www.sedarplus.ca. It was clarified that these adjustments do not impact PharmaCorp’s financial position.
